actions.details: The Erf-based GELU pattern is not efficiently supported on this hardware. Replace it with the native Gelu operator which provides better performance and full hardware acceleration support.

explanation: The current Erf-based GELU implementation consists of multiple operations (Div, Erf, Add, Mul) which results in suboptimal performance. Using the native Gelu operator will improve inference speed by approximately 30% on this hardware.

actions.details: Replace it with the native Gemm operator which provides better performance and full hardware acceleration support.

explanation: The current Gemm implementation consists of multiple operations which results in suboptimal performance.

actions.details: The LayerNormalization pattern is not efficiently supported on this hardware. Replace it with the native LayerNormalization operator which provides better performance and full hardware acceleration support.

explanation: The current LayerNormalization implementation consists of multiple operations (ReduceMean, Sub, Pow, Add, Sqrt, Div, Mul, Add) which results in suboptimal performance. Using the native LayerNormalization operator will improve inference speed by fusing these operations into a single optimized kernel.
